'''Jedi geologists''' was a term used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to describe a [[Jedi Researcher]] who specialized in the field of [[Wikipedia:geology|geology]]. These [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] who studied as a geologists were all members of the [[Agricultural Corps/Legends|Agricultural Corps,]] and were needed to assess the composition of [[Alien/Legends|alien]] crusts on recently discovered worlds. Their work allowed the seed-sowers and harvesters to best plan the farms and orchards that needed to be planted on the planet.<ref name="TJP:AMfSotF" />

One known geologist during the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]] was the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Michael Tandre]] who crash-landed on [[Orellon II]], passing on his knowledge of farming to the local [[Kentra]] where it became a planetwide religion.<ref name="J2:P">{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}</ref>
